claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: The concrete child remains the only rendered element.
semantics.namePolicy: Child aria-label, aria-labelledby, visible contents, and native semantic props win over slot props.
semantics.invalidComposition: Fragments, text, arrays, and multiple children fail with a precise error.

merge.refs: Forwarded and child refs are composed onto the same node.
merge.events: Child handlers execute first; preventDefault suppresses the slot handler.
merge.className: Slot class precedes child class without dropping either.
merge.style: Child style values override slot style values key by key.
merge.contextAttributes: Explicit Slot data attributes, dir, and lang identify and expose the composing contract; other child props remain authoritative.
merge.dataSlot: An explicit Slot data-slot identifies the composing contract; otherwise an explicit child slot is preserved, then slot is used.
merge.eventOptOut: Each Slot-owned event handler is optional; when omitted no listener or event is added and the child handler remains authoritative.

consumerResponsibilities: Choose a child whose native semantics match the action or content.
Do not use Slot to turn a non-interactive element into an undocumented control.
Retest accessible names and keyboard behavior after replacing the child element.
